name: Federal Bank Imperio Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter (subject to minimum spend of Rs 40,000 in the preceding quarter).

milestones.label: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 400 on spending Rs 5,000 within first 30 days of card issuance
Complimentary Big Basket vouchers on quarterly spend of Rs 50,000

milestoneBenefits: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 400 on spending Rs 5,000 within the first 30 days of card issuance
Complimentary Big Basket vouchers on achieving quarterly spend of Rs 50,000
additionalBenefits: Buy One Get One complimentary INOX movie ticket (once per quarter)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible transactions (Rs 400–Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 150 per month)

salaried: Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines
selfEmployed: Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Network confirmed as Mastercard per official Federal Bank page title (Federal Bank Mastercard Imperio Credit Card). Visa variant is also available.
Fees confirmed as Lifetime Free (nil joining and annual fee).
Rewards follow a 3-2-1 structure: 3x on healthcare and grocery, 2x on utilities, 1x on all other retail.
Domestic lounge access: 2 visits per quarter, subject to minimum spend of Rs 40,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Welcome benefit: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 400 on spending Rs 5,000 within the first 30 days.
Milestone benefit: Complimentary Big Basket vouchers on achieving quarterly spend of Rs 50,000.
Note: The healthcare category is mapped to base as there is no dedicated healthcare SpendCategory in the system.
